
# Equation examples (from Animal Documentation)

## Nutrient Requirements of Dairy Cattle (NRC) {#sec-nrc}

**Energy Requirements** For details about the variables included in each 
calculation, please refer to the [energykey](energy requirements key).

* **_Maintenance_** - The maintenance requirement is calculated based on metabolic body weight (body weight$^{0.75}$).

  [Lactating and Dry Cows]{.underline}
  
  $$CBW = MW * 0.06275$$ {#eq-nrc-cbw}
  
  $$CW = {(18 + (DOP - 190) * 0.665) * ( \frac{CBW}{45}),~\text{if}~DOP > 190.0}$$ {#eq-nrc-cw}
  
  *Otherwise*
  
  $$NEmaint = 0.08 \times (BW - CW)^{0.75}$$ {#eq-nrc-ne-maint}

## Reformatted equations

@eq-nrc-cbw may be visually improved by using the `\times` LaTeX
command: 

$$CBW = MW \times 0.06275$$
